title: Ubiquiti UACC-Cable-Patch-Outdoor-C6A-8M-BK, Outdoor Cat6a patch cable, 8m, black
description: UniFi Premium Patch Cable Outdoor , The ultra-thin shielded outdoor patch cable Cat.6a with a length of 8m is designed to deliver optimal performance even in the most demanding conditions, specifically for 10GbE networks. It is an ideal solution for outdoor high-speed network installations Support for PoE+++ power (100W) Shielded RJ45 connectors Insulated, durable jacket for long life and protection against outdoor elements Enhanced ESD protection with internal foil shielding and a drain wire Outer diameter: 3.5mm (lengths 1-8m), 3.9mm (lengths 12-15m) Bend radius: 28mm (lengths 1-8m), 31mm (lengths 12-15m)
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Shielding type FTP (F/UTP) Conductor wire gauge AWG34 Cable type Stranded Design Extra slim Purpose Outdoor Conductor material Copper Sheath material Thermoplastic Elastomer Length [m] 8 Operating temperature [°C] 20 up to 60 Color Black
